# Omega Guard
> Verified business identity + clone-site detection for small businesses. A product of Omega Point Solutions LLC (SDVOSB), founded by Cody A. Rose.
Primary site: https://omega-guard.omegapointsolutions.com/
Verify a business (free): https://guard.omegapointsolutions.com/
WordPress plugin: https://omega-guard.omegapointsolutions.com/omega-guard-wp.zip
